# ESiBlog — Ever Simple Blog

> *The Retro Time on Internet*

A flat-file PHP blog engine. No database — just PHP 8.1+ and a writable filesystem.

## Docs

- [README](README.md) — full project documentation, installation, features, security

## Core

- [index.php](index.php) — single-file HTTP router
- [lib/blog.php](lib/blog.php) — blog CRUD (flat-file)
- [lib/category.php](lib/category.php) — category management
- [lib/comment.php](lib/comment.php) — comment CRUD
- [lib/auth.php](lib/auth.php) — authentication + CSRF
- [lib/utils.php](lib/utils.php) — HTML sanitizer, pagination, template helpers
- [upload.php](upload.php) — file upload handler
- [filelist.php](filelist.php) — JSON file list for TinyMCE

## Optional

- [rss.php](rss.php) — RSS 2.0 feed
- [vcode.php](vcode.php) — CAPTCHA endpoint
- [secret-dist.json](secret-dist.json) — config template
- [llms.txt](llms.txt) — this file
